overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked Japanese-inspired residential district. The player moves through narrow alleys and streets illuminated by neon signs and a massive circular holographic billboard, with wet pavement reflecting the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley with traditional wooden fencing

events.description: slight camera sway as player navigates the wet alley surface

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked alley toward the illuminated circular billboard in the distance

entered.detail: vertical red neon light strips mounted on the left wall
wooden slat fencing running along the left side of the alley
traditional Japanese-style wooden residential building with lit windows
massive cylindrical billboard structure displaying rotating advertisements high above the street
wooden utility poles with crisscrossing electrical wires overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-soaked alley flanked by traditional wooden houses and fencing. Red neon signs illuminate the left wall while the camera moves forward toward a massive circular holographic billboard visible in the distance. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights, and utility poles with overhead wires frame the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street passing under large holographic advertisement structure

events.description: passing directly underneath the massive circular holographic billboard structure

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while looking up at the massive circular billboard passing overhead

entered.detail: piles of garbage bags stacked on the right sidewalk
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and passes beneath the massive circular holographic billboard that dominates the sky. Trash bags line the right sidewalk as the camera moves through the residential street. In the distance, futuristic mega-skyscrapers rise above the traditional low-rise housing, creating a stark contrast between old and new architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from residential to small commercial area with convenience store

events.description: approaching commercial area with lit convenience store becoming visible on the right
slowing slightly as approaching the intersection near the convenience store

agents.ego_description: walking through the residential street toward the commercial intersection, passing palm trees

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away down the street near the intersection

entered.detail: small commercial shop with bright illuminated signage and vending machines
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Moving past the billboard, the street widens slightly as the player approaches a commercial intersection. A brightly lit convenience store with neon signage appears on the right, while palm trees line the left side of the street. The distant mega-skyscrapers remain visible in the background, and a lone pedestrian can be seen walking ahead near the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection and wider commercial street with palm tree landscaping

events.description: turning right at the intersection near the convenience store
circular holographic billboard comes back into view from a different angle

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection and turning right, continuing down the wider street

notable_agents.action: person walking on the sidewalk near the convenience store

entered.detail: wider road intersection with crosswalk markings and open space

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the intersection, passing the convenience store which now appears on the left. The street opens up into a wider road lined with palm trees and street lamps. The circular holographic billboard becomes visible again in the distance from a new angle, and a pedestrian walks along the sidewalk near the shop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked residential district that transitions from a claustrophobic alleyway into a wide street dominated by futuristic architecture. It begins in a narrow passage flanked by traditional wooden houses and fencing, where red neon signs cast a glow over wet asphalt and overhead utility wires. As the camera advances, the view opens up toward a massive circular holographic billboard that looms in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera passes directly beneath the towering hologram, moving past trash bags lining the sidewalk of a residential street. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a stark contrast between the low-rise housing and the futuristic mega-skyscrapers rising into the night sky.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow street toward a wider commercial intersection that opens into a palm-lined boulevard. It begins by moving past a massive holographic billboard as the road widens, revealing a brightly lit convenience store on the right and distant mega-skyscrapers looming in the background. As the camera approaches the intersection, it passes a lone pedestrian before making a right turn. The scene then shifts as the convenience store moves to the left, and the environment expands into a broader road illuminated by street lamps and flanked by palm trees. Finally, the perspective pivots to reveal the circular holographic billboard once more from a new angle as the camera continues along the sidewalk.
